caption: Three people sit on a stage in front of a dark purple background with neon accents. On the left, a man with dark curly hair wears a white button-down shirt and dark trousers, sitting with his feet resting on a white, complexly structured technical block. In the center, a woman with blonde hair tied back wears a black t-shirt and black trousers. On the right, a man wearing a grey suit and light blue shirt sits with his legs crossed. Throughout the sequence, the woman and the man in the suit remain relatively still, while the man in the white shirt gesticulates with his hands as he speaks. He begins by gesturing outward with his right hand, then brings both hands together in front of his chest, and finally opens his hands again while speaking. In the background, partial neon lettering is visible, including the letters "SL".
